message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor LightBlue

box "SnapHelper"
participant "snap" as snap
participant "OnFlingListener" as OFL <<C>>
participant "OnScrollListener" as OSL <<C>>
participant "SnapHelper" as SH <<C>>
participant "LinearSmoothScroller" as LSS <<C>>
end box

OFL -> OFL : onFling
OFL -> SH : snapFromFling
snap <- SH : findTargetSnapPosition
SH -> LSS : createSnapScroller
SH <-- LSS : onTargetFound
snap <- SH : calculateDistanceToFinalSnap
OSL -> OSL : onScrollStateChanged
OSL -> SH : snapToTargetExistingView
snap <- SH : findSnapView
snap <- SH : calculateDistanceToFinalSnap

@enduml
